name: Globle: Capitals
snippet: How to Play. Every day, there is a Mystery Capital City. Your goal is to guess which capital it is using the fewest number of guesses.

name: Capital to Country Quiz - GeoGames
snippet: Test geography: given a capital, guess the country. Capital-to-country quiz for world, Europe, Asia, Africa, or US states. Free!

name: Capitals of the World - Quiz - Apps on Google Play
snippet: Free · Android Learn the capital cities of all 197 independent countries and 43 dependent territories of the world. Test your knowledge in one of the best geography games.
